channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Truck stolen in Syracuse with father's ashes still inside
item.description: SYRACUSE, N.Y. (WSYR-TV) -- A North Carolina man is pleading for help after his truck was stolen in Syracuse over the weekend. But what was inside the truck was the most troubling to him.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Cafaro, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Trump favorability ratings among lowest for nominees since 1956: Gallup
item.description: Former President Dwight D. Eisenhower received the best favorability rating in Gallup’s 1956 poll, with 84 percent supporting him.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Insurance company refuses to pay 82-year-old Las Vegas woman's claim after her home burned down
item.description: Two weeks before the fire, the insurance company canceled the woman's policy, accusing her of running a motorcycle repair shop out of her home — something the 82-year-old woman denies.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Insurance company refuses to pay 82-year-old Las Vegas woman's claim after her home burned down
item.description: Two weeks before the fire, the insurance company canceled the woman's policy, accusing her of running a motorcycle repair shop out of her home — something the 82-year-old woman denies.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KREX 5

item.title: A true homecoming for one Virginia family made the Navy town proud
item.description: From the sideline Lt. Cmdr. Tatasciore of the USS New Hampshire, aka Dad, sailed in just as his children were on the 50-yard line.
item.dc:creator: Regina Mobley, NewsNation

item.title: 19-year-old woman found dead in oven in Canada Walmart
item.description: A Canadian Walmart store was closed for a third day Tuesday as police investigated the death of a woman whose body was found inside an oven.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tears for Fears are in full bloom with a concert film, a live album, new songs and Vegas dates
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Tears for Fears hit the stage at Firstbank Amphitheater in Franklin, Tennessee, on July 11, 2023, there were no tears but some fears. “We walked on stage and I felt like a deer caught in the headlines,” says singer and guitarist Roland Orzabal, half of the duo.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US charges Iran Revolutionary Guard official in alleged plot to kill a human rights activist in NYC
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An official with Iran’s Revolutionary Guard has been charged in a plot to kill an Iranian American author on U.S. soil, according to a rewritten indictment filed on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden heaps praise on Slovenia PM for aiding release of Americans in major US-Russia prisoner swap
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden heaped praise on Slovenian Prime Minister Robert Golob on Tuesday for his role in the recent seven-nation prisoner swap that freed Americans Evan Gershkovich, Alsu Kurmasheva and Paul Whelan from Russian prison. The deal, completed in August, was the largest U.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: More Republicans are voting early than in recent years, helping break records before Election Day
item.description: With former President Donald Trump’s encouragement, Republicans are voting early again, flocking to the polls for in-person voting ahead of Election Day and helping break records for ballots cast before November in key states like Georgia and North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MLB wants the Tampa Bay Rays to play in the area if hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field is unfit
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Major League Baseball hopes to find the Tampa Bay Rays a temporary home near their fanbase at least for the start of the 2025 season if the damage to Tropicana Field from Hurricane Milton cannot be repaired in time. The translucent fiberglass dome at the ballpark in St.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Pumpkin spice car wash raising money for families in need
item.description: A New England company is bringing everyone's favorite fall flavor somewhere unexpected: the car wash.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Turley, NewsNation

item.title: Foster kids in downtown Memphis housing units out of control: Neighbors
item.description: This comes a year after the Tennessee Department of Children’s Services said children in state care were sleeping on floors.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: Meta again testing facial recognition software to fight 'celeb bait' scams
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, is testing facial recognition software to combat “celeb bait” scams on its platforms as well as to allow users to more easily regain access to their accounts.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KRON4

item.title: Husband of missing Texas real estate agent denies ‘ludicrous’ charges against him: lawyer
item.description: As the search for missing Texas mom of four Suzanne Simpson continues, an attorney representing her husband Brad Simpson has spoken out on the charges against him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump tells child US 'won’t have any cows' under Harris
item.description: The Harris-Walz team hit back by calling the claims a “delusional rant,” questioning the former president’s mental capacity.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Former Abercrombie & Fitch chief Mike Jeffries arrested on federal sex trafficking charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Former Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Mike Jeffries, his romantic partner and a third man were arrested Tuesday on charges of luring men into sex parties held around the world, sometimes by dangling the promise of modeling for the clothing retailer.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington state teen in custody after shooting at home leaves 5 of 7 family members dead
item.description: Police in Fall City, Washington, are investigating a domestic violence shooting at a home that left five members of a family dead and a teenager in custody.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal lawsuit filed against use of Flock cameras in Norfolk
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (WAVY) — A federal lawsuit has been filed on behalf of two area residents who are challenging the legality of using Flock cameras in the city of Norfolk.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy LaRoue, NewsNation

item.title: Groups rallying against police crackdown on prostitution in AOC's 'Red Light' district
item.description: A rally is taking place in "Squad" member Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s district on Tuesday, when pro migrant and pro sex worker groups will call for police to stop clamping down on prostitution and illegal vendors in the area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Captain rescued after surviving Hurricane Milton inside cooler: boat owner
item.description: The Coast Guard rescued the captain of the "Capt. Dave" boat following Hurricane Milton. The ship's owner, Steven Hawley, indicated that the captain survived in a cooler box.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: On Lake Erie, getting rid of problem algae starts with giving it less food
item.description: OREGON, Ohio (AP) — On a warm late-summer evening, a small speedboat motored across a pea-green stretch of Lake Erie past a beach where a child sat splashing and a pair of newlyweds waded for a portrait photographer.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA A. BICKEL and PATRICK AFTOORA-ORSAGOS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mexican man wanted for child sex offense apprehended at Texas border
item.description: CBP officers turned Gutierrez Ramos over to the Maverick County Sheriff’s Office for adjudication of the warrant.
item.dc:creator: TMX, NewsNation

item.title: Starbucks to release 'Wicked' drinks inspired by the upcoming film
item.description: Starbucks is releasing two limited-time drinks inspired by the two main characters in the upcoming film, "Wicked.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: What is pink cocaine? Autopsy finds drug in Liam Payne's body
item.description: A partial autopsy conducted on former One Direction singer Liam Payne found multiple substances in his system when he fell to his death from the third-floor balcony of a hotel room in Argentina last week, according to a new report from ABC News.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, Fox 5

item.title: Former Ohio officer stands trial in the 2020 shooting death of Andre Hill
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — A white former Ohio police officer has gone on trial Monday in the killing of Andre Hill, a Black man who was shot as he emerged from a garage holding a cellphone nearly four years ago.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Helicopter crash in Houston kills 4, topples radio tower, officials say
item.description: The private helicopter with four people on board, including a child, either struck a cable or the tower, Houston Police Chief J. Noe Diaz said at a news conference.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Harris raises more than $220 million in September, outraising Trump 3-to-1
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris’s campaign raised nearly $222 million in September, raising more than three times as much as former President Donald Trump’s campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: This $600 robot litter box is life changing
item.description: Cats are great companions, but scooping out their litter box isn't exactly a chore you look forward to. I've long been curious about automated litter boxes that promise to do the dirty work.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: 2 Navy aviators are declared dead after a fighter jet crashed in Washington state
item.description: Two crew members who were missing following the crash of a fighter jet in mountainous terrain in Washington state during a routine training flight have been declared dead, the U.S. Navy said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pups on parade: Dogs dressed to the nines for annual Halloween event
item.description: Costumed pups were dressed up in bow ties, wigs and shades at the annual Tompkins Square Halloween Dog Parade in New York City.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: At least 7 dead after ferry dock gangway collapses on Georgia's Sapelo Island
item.description: SAVANNAH, Ga. (AP) — Authorities said at least seven people were killed Saturday when part of a ferry dock collapsed on Georgia's Sapelo Island, where crowds had gathered for a fall celebration by the island's tiny Gullah-Geechee community of Black slave descendants.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, Associated Press, Fox 5
